name: golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev
title: golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev
summary: Detection of the BOM and removing as necessary
description:
Detection of the BOM and removing as necessary
The package utfbom implements the detection of the BOM (Unicode Byte
Order Mark) and removing as necessary. It can also return the encoding
detected by the BOM.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev because Detection of the BOM and removing as necessary.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-dimchansky-utfbom-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
